nodes.label: Obscura Vault System
nodes.rationale: Built to run on a Lenovo T480 (i5-7300U, 8 GB RAM, no GPU) using only free-tier APIs.

nodes.label: Token Performance Signals
nodes.rationale: Reweight ideas based on token-level CTR, AVD, and views to suppress losing patterns.

nodes.label: Channel Intro/Outro Stings
nodes.rationale: Zero-quality-loss addition using stream-copy concat to avoid re-encoding the main video.

nodes.label: Whisper Transcription & Burn-in
nodes.rationale: Burned captions add measurable retention (5-15% AVD lift) for watch-without-sound traffic.

nodes.label: Semantic B-roll Engine
nodes.rationale: Uses LLM-written cinematographic queries instead of keyword maps for better visual relevance.

nodes.label: Idea Niche Fit Scoring
nodes.rationale: Batched LLM scoring filters out generic or transient content and prioritizes deep history niche.

nodes.label: SQLite Job History
nodes.rationale: Provides persistence across restarts and allows recovery of orphaned jobs.

nodes.label: OpenRouter Free-Model Cascade
nodes.rationale: Ensures zero-cost operations by falling back through 5 free models if one is down or rate-limited.

nodes.label: Citation-Grounded Fact Extraction
nodes.rationale: Reduces hallucinations by forcing script generation to cite specific [fX] IDs from research packs.

nodes.label: LLM Performance Scorecard
nodes.rationale: Closes the creative feedback loop by critiquing artifacts against a 6-dimension rubric.

nodes.label: Autopilot Scheduler
nodes.rationale: Single daemon thread that makes the system self-running (harvest, produce, cleanup).

nodes.label: Script Quality Gates
nodes.rationale: Ensures scripts meet duration, tone, and formatting requirements before production.

nodes.label: SEO Scoring Rubric
nodes.rationale: Scores 12 title candidates based on YouTube's informational/curiosity-gap sweet spots.

nodes.label: Output Cap Enforcement
nodes.rationale: Prevents SSD bloat on the T480 by automatically purging oldest renders above 30 GB.

nodes.label: AI Thumbnail Composition
nodes.rationale: Auto-QA with luminance checks ensures punchy 2-4 word text is always readable over AI backgrounds.

nodes.label: Resumable YouTube Upload
nodes.rationale: Handles transient network failures on the T480 without restarting the entire upload.

nodes.label: Single-File Pipeline UI
nodes.rationale: No build step required; all state handled in JS for rapid local iteration.
